family_name: Prime labelings of zero-divisor graph families
strongest_honest_claim: As of 2026-04-12T03:55:30-0400, the strongest honest family claim remains the Lean-checked paired structural theorem `AutoMath.Families.ZeroDivisorPublicationSlice.zero_divisor_prime_labelings_paired_exact_slice`. The bounded prior-art audit did not establish rediscovery: Fox-Mooney's 2025 canonical source still leaves the ambient families `Γ(Z_p × Z_p × Z_q)` and `Γ(Z_p × Z_(q^2))` open as Conjectures 4.3 and 4.4, and the bounded outside-source sweep did not surface an independent closure of the active q = 2 or q = 5 subfamilies. What is exact here is the reduction slice, not a direct all-primes `F25` existence theorem; the first direct `Γ(Z_p × Z_25)` publication upgrade remains the finite-range `59 <= p <= 97` corollary, still blocked only by the `C`-class injection / extension packaging from `fixedC0Finset`.
paper_title_hint: Paired Support-Reduction Theorems for Prime Labelings of Two Zero-Divisor Graph Families
theorem_slice_target: Prove the direct fixed-window `Γ(Z_p × Z_25)` corollary for odd primes `59 <= p <= 97` by combining `AutoMath.Families.ZeroDivisorF25FrozenWrapper.exists_fixedC0_subset_card_eq_C_size_of_p_le_97` with an injection / extension theorem into `AutoMath.Families.ZeroDivisorF25FrozenWrapper.zp_z25_fixed_C0_high_barrier_wrapper_graph_skeleton_of_p_le_97`, while keeping `AutoMath.Families.ZeroDivisorPublicationSlice.zero_divisor_prime_labelings_paired_exact_slice` as the closed paper core.
fallback_target: If that finite-range `F25` corollary does not close, freeze the claim at the exact paired slice plus the exact `F2` lead theorem, the checked fixed-window `F25` supply/subset lemmas, and the template boundaries `p = 71` (strict prime-only wording fails) and `p = 101` (the frozen `C0` window ends), without claiming any graph-level counterexample.
next_blocker: The only live blocker to a referee-facing direct `F25` theorem is to package a chosen `(p - 1)`-element subset of `fixedC0Finset` as an injective `C`-class labeling and extend it to a total label function whose residual image supplies the `D` class inside `AutoMath.Families.ZeroDivisorF25FrozenWrapper.zp_z25_fixed_C0_high_barrier_wrapper_graph_skeleton_of_p_le_97`.
next_action: Keep the paper headline fixed at the paired support-reduction slice. Formalize the `C`-class injection / extension package for the fixed-window `F25` corollary, then rerun `publication_audit`; only if that packaging still stalls should feeder work resume at `z109-z25-prime-zero-divisor-graph` and `z113-z25-prime-zero-divisor-graph` as post-97 continuation tests.
